exchanges.prompt: Design a multi-cloud architecture using AWS S3 for storage, Azure Functions for compute, and GCP BigQuery for analytics with a Kubernetes orchestration layer

response.content:
graph TD
    subgraph Kubernetes Orchestration
        K8s[Kubernetes] -->|orchestration| AWS_S3
        K8s -->|orchestration| Azure_Functions
        K8s -->|orchestration| GCP_BigQuery
    end
    subgraph Cloud Storage
        AWS_S3[AWS S3] -->|storage| Data
    end
    subgraph Cloud Compute
        Azure_Functions[Azure Functions] -->|compute| Azure_App
    end
    subgraph Cloud Analytics
        GCP_BigQuery[GCP BigQuery] -->|analytics| Insights
    end
    Azure_App -->|data ingestion| AWS_S3
    AWS_S3 -->|data processing| Azure_Functions
    Azure_Functions -->|data analysis| GCP_BigQuery
    GCP_BigQuery -->|insights generation| Insights
